title: When you realize that you’re the senior dev now.
summary: A YouTube video from Google for Developers featuring Pete King reflecting on the moment someone realizes they have become a senior developer. The piece treats the transition to seniority as a moment of unexpected responsibility.
writeup: Pete King reflects on the experience of becoming a senior developer, using humor to capture the realization of career advancement in software development. The short piece from Google for Developers frames the shift in role and responsibility that comes with seniority.
